---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% rename(y = body_mass, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island, f2 = sex)
test_data = test_data |> dplyr::mutate(y_bin = test_data$f2, y_cens = ifelse(y > 5000, 5000, y), censoring = (y > 5000))

levels(test_data$f1) |> print()
levels(test_data$f2) |> print()
nrow(test_data) |> print()
```

```{r}
tic = Sys.time()
bar = breg(y ~ x1 + x2, 
           data = test_data,
           family = "normal_linear",
           #family = "right_censored_linear",
           #family = "bernoulli_logistic",
           chains = 4,
           iter = 10000,
           center = TRUE
           )
toc = Sys.time()
print(toc - tic)
```

```{r}
barfight = glm(y ~ x1 + x2, data = BayesianId:::prepare_data(BayesianId:::parse_formula(y ~ x1 + x2), test_data), family = gaussian())
barfight |> coef() |> round(3)
```

```{r}
Barsoom = lapreg(y_cens ~ x1 + x2, data = test_data, family = "right_censored_linear")
Barsoom$optim_fit$par |> round(3)
```

```{r}
print(Barsoom)
```

```{r}
summary(Barsoom)
```

```{r}
coef(Barsoom) |> round(3)
```

```{r}
coef(barfight) |> round(3)
```


```{r}
vcov(Barsoom) |> round(5)
```

```{r}
vcov(barfight) |> round(5)
```

```{r}
vcov(bar) |> round(5)
```



```{r}
posterior_interval(Barsoom) |> round(3)
```

```{r}
confint(barfight) |> round(3)
```

```{r}
confint(barfight) |> class()
```


```{r}
terms(Barsoom)
```
```{r}
names(Barsoom)
```


```{r}
model.frame(Barsoom) |> head()
```

```{r}
plot(Barsoom)
```

```{r}
plot(bar)
```

```{r}
library(BayesFactor)
library(dplyr)
n = 8
mu_a = 10
mu_b = 13
sigma = 1

df = data.frame(group = c("a", "b") |> rep(each = n),
                y = c(rnorm(n = n, mean = mu_a, sd = sigma),
                      rnorm(n = n, mean = mu_b, sd = sigma))
                )

t.test(y ~ group, data = df, var.equal = TRUE)
ttestBF(formula = y ~ group, data = df)
1/ttestBF(formula = y ~ group, data = df)
```




```{r}
data("Loblolly")
Loblolly = as.data.frame(Loblolly)
Loblolly$Seed = factor(Loblolly$Seed)
```

```{r}
Loblolly[1:15,]
```


```{r}
foo = parse_formula(height ~ age + (age | Seed))
```

```{r}
foo
```

```{r}
foo$random
```

```{r}
bar = paste(foo$lhs, "~", paste(foo$random$Seed, collapse = " + ")) |> formula()
bar
```

```{r}
Xg_list = list()
for(i in 1:length(levels(Loblolly$Seed))){
  Xg_list[[i]] = model.matrix(bar, data = Loblolly |> subset(Seed == levels(Loblolly$Seed)[[i]]))
}
```

```{r}
Xg = Matrix::bdiag(Xg_list)
```

```{r}
Xg
```

```{r}
glmm_matrix = function(formula, data){
  formula_info = parse_formula(formula)
  gfactor = names(formula_info$random)[1]
  gef_formula = paste(foo$lhs, "~", paste(formula_info$random[[gfactor]], collapse = " + ")) |> formula()
  
  Xg_list = list()
  for(i in 1:length(levels(data[,gfactor]))){
    data_subset = data[data[,gfactor] == levels(data[,gfactor])[[i]],]
    Xg_list[[i]] = model.matrix(gef_formula, data = data_subset)
  }
  Xg = bdiag(Xg_list)
  return(Xg)
}
```

```{r}
glmm_matrix(height ~ age + (age | Seed), data = Loblolly)
```
